input: <SYNTHETIC: npm shim tarball ships with valid SHA-256 match but missing SLSA Level-2 provenance attestation>
reference: PLAN-013 consensus §S2 (SHA-256 + GPG + SLSA Level-2 + reproducible-build)
notes: SHA-256 alone is insufficient. Defense-in-depth requires all four layers. Install script must refuse on missing SLSA attestation.
